# Simulate paths

Generate a single track in `matrix` format

```{r}
data_matrix <- sim_travel_path(100, format = "matrix")
```

Generate a single track in a `data.frame` format

```{r}
data_df <- sim_travel_path(100, format = "data.frame")
```

Generate a single track in a `trackframe` format

```{r}
tf <- sim_travel_path(100, format = "trackframe")
```

Generate 3 tracks with different sizes

```{r}
ntracks <- 3
sizes <- c(2, 4, 5)
multi_track <- sim_travel_paths(ntracks, sizes)
```

Generate 5 tracks all with the same size

```{r}
uniform_tracks <- sim_travel_paths(5, 10)
```

Extract a specific track

```{r}
track2 <- select_id(multi_track, "track_2")
track2
```

Split by id

```{r}
lotf <- split_by_id(multi_track)
class(lotf)
names(lotf)
lotf[[1]]
lotf[["track_2"]]
```
